name: acr check-name
description: Checks whether a container registry name is available.

name: acr create
description: Creates a new Azure Container Registry.

options.description: SKU name: Basic, Standard, or Premium. Defaults to Basic.

examples.title: Create a Standard registry with admin user

name: acr delete
description: Deletes an Azure Container Registry.

name: acr generate-credentials
description: Generates credentials for an Azure Container Registry token.

options.description: Resource ID of the token for which credentials are generated.
Expiry date-time for the generated credentials (ISO 8601). Defaults to 1 year from now.
Specific password to regenerate: password1 or password2. Omit to regenerate both.

name: acr list
description: Lists Azure Container Registries.

options.description: Resource group name. Omit to list across the entire subscription.

examples.title: List registries in a resource group
List all registries in a subscription

name: acr list-credentials
description: Lists admin credentials for an Azure Container Registry.

name: acr list-usages
description: Lists quota usages for an Azure Container Registry.

name: acr regenerate-credential
description: Regenerates an admin password for an Azure Container Registry.

name: acr repository delete
description: Deletes a repository from an Azure Container Registry.

name: acr repository list
description: Lists repositories in an Azure Container Registry.

name: acr show
description: Shows details of an Azure Container Registry.

name: acr update
description: Updates an Azure Container Registry.

options.description: SKU name: Basic, Standard, or Premium.
Enable or disable the admin user (true/false).
Resource tags (key=value pairs). Replaces existing tags.

examples.title: Change SKU and set tags
examples.command:
topaz acr update \
    --subscription-id "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000" \
    --resource-group "my-rg" \
    --name "myregistry" \
    --sku Premium \
    --tags env=prod team=ops

name: appservice plan create
description: Creates or updates an App Service Plan.

options.description: (Optional) SKU name (e.g. B1, S1, P1v2). Defaults to B1.

name: appservice plan delete
description: Deletes an App Service Plan.

name: appservice plan get
description: Gets an App Service Plan.

name: appservice plan list
description: Lists App Service Plans in a resource group.

examples.title: List plans in a resource group

name: appservice plan restart-sites
description: Restarts all Web Apps in an App Service Plan.

name: appservice site check-name
description: Checks if the provided App Service site name is globally available.

options.description: (Required) App Service site name to check.

name: appservice site config get-web
description: Gets the web configuration of a Web App (Microsoft.Web/sites/config/web).

name: appservice site config list-appsettings
description: Lists the current application settings of a Web App (Microsoft.Web/sites/config/appsettings/list).

name: appservice site config set-appsettings
description: Replaces all application settings of a Web App (Microsoft.Web/sites/config/appsettings).

name: appservice site config update-web
description: Updates the web configuration of a Web App (Microsoft.Web/sites/config/web). Only supplied fields are changed.

examples.title: Set always-on and Linux runtime
examples.command:
topaz appservice site config update-web \
    --subscription-id "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000" \
    --resource-group "rg-local" \
    --name "my-site" \
    --always-on true \
    --linux-fx-version "DOTNETCORE|8.0"

name: appservice site create
description: Creates or updates a Web App or Function App (Microsoft.Web/sites).

options.description: (Optional) Site kind: app, functionapp, functionapp,linux. Defaults to app.
(Optional) Resource ID of the App Service Plan to associate with this site.

name: appservice site delete
description: Deletes a Web App or Function App.

name: appservice site get
description: Gets a Web App or Function App.

name: appservice site list
description: Lists Web Apps and Function Apps in a resource group.

examples.title: List sites in a resource group

name: chaos disable
description: Disables chaos mode in the Topaz host.

name: chaos enable
description: Enables chaos mode in the Topaz host.

name: chaos rule create
description: Creates a chaos fault rule.

options.description: (Required) Service namespace to match, e.g. Microsoft.Storage or * for all.
(Required) Fault type: Timeout | TransientError | Throttle | ServiceUnavailable.

examples.title: Create a throttle rule for Storage
examples.command: topaz chaos rule create --rule-id throttle-storage --namespace Microsoft.Storage --fault-type Throttle --rate 0.5 --status-code 429

name: chaos rule delete
description: Deletes a chaos fault rule.

name: chaos rule disable
description: Disables a chaos fault rule.

name: chaos rule enable
description: Enables a chaos fault rule.

name: chaos rule list
description: Lists all chaos fault rules.

name: chaos rule show
description: Gets a chaos fault rule by ID.

name: chaos status
description: Returns the current chaos mode status from the Topaz host.

name: configure show

name: keyvault certificate backup
description: Backs up a certificate from an Azure Key Vault as an opaque blob.

name: keyvault certificate cancel-operation
description: Cancels the pending creation operation for a certificate in an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault certificate create
description: Creates a self-signed certificate in an Azure Key Vault.

options.description: (Optional) X.509 subject (e.g. CN=my-cert). Defaults to CN=<name>.
(Optional) RSA key size in bits. Defaults to 2048.

name: keyvault certificate delete
description: Deletes a certificate from an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault certificate delete-operation
description: Deletes the pending creation operation for a certificate in an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault certificate get
description: Gets a certificate from an Azure Key Vault.

options.description: (Optional) Certificate version. Omit to get the latest.

name: keyvault certificate get-deleted
description: Gets a soft-deleted certificate from an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault certificate get-operation
description: Gets the pending creation operation for a certificate in an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault certificate import
description: Imports a PFX/PKCS#12 certificate into an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault certificate list
description: Lists all certificates in an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault certificate list-deleted
description: Lists soft-deleted certificates in an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault certificate list-versions
description: Lists all versions of a certificate in an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault certificate purge
description: Permanently deletes a soft-deleted certificate from an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault certificate recover
description: Recovers a soft-deleted certificate in an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault certificate restore
description: Restores a certificate into an Azure Key Vault from a backup blob.

options.description: (Required) Base64url-encoded backup blob produced by the backup command.

name: keyvault certificate update
description: Updates the attributes of a certificate in an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault check-name
description: Checks if the provided Key Vault name is available.

options.description: Type of Key Vault to create.

name: keyvault create
description: Creates a new Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault delete
description: Deletes a Key Vault.

name: keyvault key backup
description: Backs up a key from an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault key create
description: Creates a key in an Azure Key Vault.

options.description: Key type (RSA, EC). Defaults to RSA.
RSA key size in bits (2048, 3072, 4096). Defaults to 2048.
EC curve name (P-256, P-384, P-521). Defaults to P-256 for EC keys.

examples.title: Create an EC key
examples.command: topaz keyvault key create --vault-name "kvlocal" --name "my-ec-key" --kty EC --crv P-256 --resource-group "rg-local" --subscription-id "36a28ebb-9370-46d8-981c-84efe02048ae"

name: keyvault key decrypt
description: Decrypts ciphertext using a Key Vault key (RSA keys only: RSA1_5, RSA-OAEP, RSA-OAEP-256).

options.description: (Required) Decryption algorithm. Supported: RSA1_5, RSA-OAEP, RSA-OAEP-256.

name: keyvault key delete
description: Soft-deletes a key from an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault key encrypt
description: Encrypts plaintext using a Key Vault key (RSA keys only: RSA1_5, RSA-OAEP, RSA-OAEP-256).

options.description: (Required) Encryption algorithm. Supported: RSA1_5, RSA-OAEP, RSA-OAEP-256.

name: keyvault key get
description: Gets a key from an Azure Key Vault (latest version or a specific version).

options.description: Key version (omit to retrieve the latest version).

examples.title: Get the latest version of a key
Get a specific version of a key

name: keyvault key get-attestation
description: Gets a key and its attestation information from an Azure Key Vault. For software-backed keys the attestation field is null, matching real Azure behaviour.

options.description: Key version (omit to retrieve the latest version).

examples.title: Get attestation for the latest version of a key
Get attestation for a specific version of a key

name: keyvault key get-deleted
description: Gets a deleted key from an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault key import
description: Imports an externally created key into an Azure Key Vault.

options.description: (Required) Path to a PEM-encoded RSA or EC key file.

examples.title: Import an RSA key from a PEM file

name: keyvault key list
description: Lists all keys in an Azure Key Vault.

examples.title: List all keys in a vault

name: keyvault key list-versions
description: Lists all versions of a key in an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault key purge
description: Permanently deletes a soft-deleted key in an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault key random-bytes
description: Generates random bytes using the Key Vault random number generator.

options.description: (Optional) Key Vault name. When provided the remote Key Vault RNG endpoint is used; otherwise bytes are generated locally.
(Required) Number of random bytes to generate (1–128).

name: keyvault key recover
description: Recovers a soft-deleted key from an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault key release
description: Releases a key for Secure Key Release (SKR). Any non-empty attestation token is accepted by the emulator.

options.description: (Required) Attestation assertion (target). Any non-empty value is accepted by the emulator.
(Optional) Encryption algorithm hint. Accepted but not enforced by the emulator.

name: keyvault key restore
description: Restores a key into an Azure Key Vault from a backup blob.

options.description: (Required) Base64url-encoded backup blob produced by the backup command.

name: keyvault key rotate
description: Rotates a key in an Azure Key Vault by creating a new version with fresh cryptographic material of the same type.

name: keyvault key rotation-policy show
description: Gets the rotation policy for a key in an Azure Key Vault.

examples.title: Get the rotation policy for a key

name: keyvault key rotation-policy update
description: Updates the rotation policy for a key in an Azure Key Vault.

options.description: The expiry time as an ISO 8601 duration (e.g. P2Y). If omitted, the expiry is cleared.

examples.title: Set a 2-year expiry on a key rotation policy

name: keyvault key sign
description: Signs a pre-hashed digest using a Key Vault key (RSA: RS256, RS384, RS512, PS256, PS384, PS512; EC: ES256, ES384, ES512).

options.description: (Required) Signing algorithm. Supported: RS256, RS384, RS512, PS256, PS384, PS512, ES256, ES384, ES512.

name: keyvault key unwrap
description: Unwraps (decrypts) a wrapped key using a Key Vault key (RSA keys only: RSA1_5, RSA-OAEP, RSA-OAEP-256).

options.description: (Required) Unwrap algorithm. Supported: RSA1_5, RSA-OAEP, RSA-OAEP-256.
(Required) Base64url-encoded wrapped key material to unwrap.

name: keyvault key update
description: Updates the attributes of a key version in an Azure Key Vault.

options.description: Enable or disable the key version.

name: keyvault key verify
description: Verifies a signature against a pre-hashed digest using a Key Vault key (RSA: RS256, RS384, RS512, PS256, PS384, PS512; EC: ES256, ES384, ES512).

options.description: (Required) Verification algorithm. Supported: RS256, RS384, RS512, PS256, PS384, PS512, ES256, ES384, ES512.

name: keyvault key wrap
description: Wraps (encrypts) a key using a Key Vault key (RSA keys only: RSA1_5, RSA-OAEP, RSA-OAEP-256).

options.description: (Required) Wrap algorithm. Supported: RSA1_5, RSA-OAEP, RSA-OAEP-256.

name: keyvault secret backup
description: Backs up a secret from an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault secret delete
description: Deletes a secret from an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault secret get
description: Gets a secret from an Azure Key Vault.

options.description: Secret version. Defaults to the latest version.

name: keyvault secret get-deleted
description: Gets a deleted secret from an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault secret list
description: Lists all secrets in an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault secret list-deleted
description: Lists all deleted secrets in an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault secret list-versions
description: Lists all versions of a secret in an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault secret purge
description: Permanently deletes a soft-deleted secret in an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault secret recover
description: Recovers a deleted secret in an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault secret restore
description: Restores a secret into an Azure Key Vault from a backup blob.

options.description: (Required) Base64url-encoded backup blob produced by the backup command.

name: keyvault secret set
description: Sets a secret in an Azure Key Vault.

name: keyvault secret update
description: Updates the attributes of a secret in an Azure Key Vault.

name: role assignment create
description: Creates (or updates) an Azure RBAC role assignment for a principal at a given scope.

options.description: (Required) role assignment name (GUID). This becomes the roleAssignment resource name.
(Required) scope for the role assignment. Example: /subscriptions/<subId> or a resource ID.

examples.title: Assign Reader at subscription scope to a managed identity (or service principal)
examples.command:
topaz role assignment create --subscription-id 36a28ebb-9370-46d8-981c-84efe02048ae \
    --name 11111111-2222-3333-4444-555555555555 \
    --role-definition-id acdd72a7-3385-48ef-bd42-f606fba81ae7 \
    --principal-id 66666666-7777-8888-9999-000000000000 \
    --principal-type ServicePrincipal \
    --scope /subscriptions/36a28ebb-9370-46d8-981c-84efe02048ae

examples.title: Assign Key Vault Secrets User at Key Vault scope (data-plane secrets access)
examples.command:
topaz role assignment create --subscription-id 36a28ebb-9370-46d8-981c-84efe02048ae \
    --name aaaaaaaa-bbbb-cccc-dddd-eeeeeeeeeeee \
    --role-definition-id 4633458b-17de-408a-b874-0445c86b69e6 \
    --principal-id 66666666-7777-8888-9999-000000000000 \
    --principal-type ServicePrincipal \
    --scope /subscriptions/36a28ebb-9370-46d8-981c-84efe02048ae/resourceGroups/rg-local/providers/Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/mykv

name: storage account check-name
description: Checks whether a storage account name is available.

name: storage account create
description: Creates a new Azure Storage account.

name: storage account delete
description: Deletes an Azure Storage account.

name: storage account generate-sas
description: Generates a Shared Access Signature (SAS) token for a storage account.

options.description: (Required) The storage services to sign (b=blob, f=file, q=queue, t=table). Combine letters as needed.
(Required) The resource types accessible with the SAS (s=service, c=container, o=object).
(Required) The permissions granted by the SAS (e.g. rwdlacup).
Restrict to a specific IP address or range.
The storage account key to use for signing (key1 or key2).

name: storage account generate-service-sas
description: Generates a service-level Shared Access Signature (SAS) token for a storage account resource.

options.description: (Required) Signed resource type (b=blob, c=container, f=file, s=share).
(Required) The permissions granted by the SAS (e.g. rwdl).
Restrict to a specific IP address or range.
The storage account key to use for signing (key1 or key2).

name: storage account keys list
description: Lists the access keys for a storage account.

name: storage account keys renew
description: Regenerates an access key for a storage account.

options.description: (Required) The key to regenerate (key1 or key2).

name: storage account list
description: Lists Azure Storage accounts.

options.description: Resource group name (filters to accounts in this group when specified).

examples.title: List all accounts in a subscription
List accounts in a resource group

name: storage account show
description: Shows details of an Azure Storage account.

name: storage account show-connection-string
description: Shows the connection string for a storage account.

name: storage account update
description: Updates an Azure Storage account.

examples.title: Update tags on a storage account

name: storage blob copy
description: Copies a blob to a destination container, optionally across accounts.

name: storage blob delete
description: Deletes a blob from a container.

name: storage blob download
description: Downloads a blob to a local file.

options.description: Destination file path (defaults to blob name).

name: storage blob lease
description: Manages lease operations on a blob (acquire, renew, change, release, break).

options.description: (Required) Lease action: acquire, renew, change, release, or break.
Lease duration in seconds (-1 for infinite).
Existing lease ID (required for renew, change, release).
Proposed lease ID (required for change action).
Break period in seconds (used with break action).

name: storage blob list
description: Lists blobs in a container.

name: storage blob metadata show
description: Shows the metadata key-value pairs on a blob.

name: storage blob metadata update
description: Sets or replaces metadata key-value pairs on a blob.

name: storage blob show
description: Shows the properties of a blob.

name: storage blob snapshot
description: Creates a read-only snapshot of a blob at the current time.

options.description: Lease ID required if the blob has an active lease.

name: storage blob undelete
description: Restores a soft-deleted blob.

name: storage blob update
description: Updates the HTTP properties (content type, encoding, etc.) of a blob.

examples.title: Update content type of a blob

name: storage blob upload
description: Uploads a local file to a blob container.

options.description: (Required) Path to the local file to upload.
Blob name (defaults to the file name).

name: storage container create
description: Creates a new blob container in a storage account.

name: storage container delete
description: Deletes a blob container from a storage account.

name: storage container list
description: Lists blob containers in a storage account.

name: storage container metadata set
description: Sets metadata key-value pairs on a blob container.

name: storage message delete
description: Deletes a message from a queue.

options.description: (Required) Pop receipt obtained when the message was dequeued.

name: storage message get
description: Dequeues one or more messages from a queue, hiding them for the visibility timeout duration.

options.description: Number of messages to retrieve (1–32). Default: 1.
Seconds messages are hidden after dequeue (0–604800). Default: 30.

name: storage message peek
description: Peeks at one or more messages in a queue without dequeuing them.

options.description: Number of messages to peek (1–32). Default: 1.

name: storage message put
description: Enqueues a new message in a queue.

options.description: Seconds the message is invisible after enqueue (0–604800). Default: 0.

name: storage message update
description: Updates the visibility timeout and/or content of a dequeued message.

options.description: (Required) Pop receipt obtained when the message was dequeued.
New visibility timeout in seconds (0–604800). Default: 30.
Updated message content. If omitted, content is preserved.

name: storage queue create
description: Creates a new queue in a storage account.

name: storage queue delete
description: Deletes a queue from a storage account.

name: storage queue list
description: Lists queues in a storage account.

name: storage queue show
description: Shows properties of a queue in a storage account.

name: storage table create
description: Creates a new table in a storage account.

name: storage table delete
description: Deletes a table from a storage account.

name: storage table delete-entity
description: Deletes an entity from a storage table.

options.description: ETag for conditional delete (defaults to * for unconditional).

name: storage table insert-entity
description: Inserts an entity into a storage table.

options.description: (Required) JSON-encoded entity object with PartitionKey and RowKey.

name: storage table list
description: Lists tables in a storage account.

name: storage table query-entity
description: Queries entities in a storage table with an optional OData filter.

name: storage table show
description: Shows whether a table exists in a storage account.

name: subscription cancel
description: Cancels a subscription, setting its state to Disabled.

name: subscription create
description: Creates a new subscription.

options.description: Tags to assign to the subscription (key=value).

name: subscription delete
description: Deletes a subscription.

name: subscription enable
description: Enables a subscription, setting its state to Enabled.

name: subscription list
description: Lists all subscriptions.

name: subscription list-locations
description: Lists all available Azure locations for a subscription.

name: vm create
description: Creates or updates an Azure Virtual Machine.

options.description: (Optional) VM size (e.g. Standard_D2_v3). Defaults to Standard_D2_v3.

name: vm delete
description: Deletes an Azure Virtual Machine.

name: vm image-version get
description: Gets an Azure Virtual Machine image version.

examples.title: Gets a Virtual Machine image version

name: vm image-version list
description: Lists Azure Virtual Machine image versions.

name: vm list
description: Lists Azure Virtual Machines in a subscription or resource group.

examples.title: Lists Virtual Machines in a resource group

name: vm show
description: Gets an Azure Virtual Machine.

name: vm update
description: Updates an Azure Virtual Machine.

name: vnet check-ip
description: Checks whether a private IP address is available for use in a Virtual Network.

name: vnet create
description: Creates or updates an Azure Virtual Network.

options.description: Address prefix for the virtual network (e.g. 10.0.0.0/16)

name: vnet delete
description: Deletes an Azure Virtual Network.

name: vnet list
description: Lists Azure Virtual Networks in a subscription or resource group.

examples.title: Lists Virtual Networks in a resource group

name: vnet show
description: Gets an Azure Virtual Network.

name: vnet subnet create
description: Creates or updates a subnet in a Virtual Network.

name: vnet subnet delete
description: Deletes a subnet from a Virtual Network.

name: vnet subnet list
description: Lists subnets in a Virtual Network.

name: vnet subnet show
description: Gets a subnet from a Virtual Network.
